channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: O/s 88 Brondesbury villas on pavements and road, 15th May
item.description:
The pavement and road needs sweeping so that all the litter does not end up in the nearby drain and when it rains the road will flood and turn into a swimming pool again

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Dumped metal safe on footpath, 15th May
item.description:
There is a dumped metallic safe which has been dumped on the pedestrian footpath for a number of weeks located on the junction of mayplace road east & erith road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 124, Erith Road, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter at Bus stop, 15th May
item.description:
Damaged rubbish bin and rubbish bags blocking foot path at the bus bexleyheath bus stop going towards Bexleyheath direction. Lots of rubbish on the road and footpath in general on both sides of the pavements also.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 124, Erith Road, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Somerfield Road, 15th May
item.description:
Litter on Somerfield Road between Queens Drive and Finsbury Park Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Somerfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The drain is blocked, 15th May
item.description:
The drain directly outside property number 75 Anerley Road is blocked and needs unblocking. This is leading to large volumes of water blocking the path, and limiting access to the front door, when rain is heavy.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 75, Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plants bedding in front of the shops across Woodrow House, 15th May
item.description:
Constantly dirty with a lot of rubbish inside the plants bedding and on the side of the street. Dogs or foxes poo everywhere. Disgusting area. Council's street sweepers never been seen in this street. Please clean at least once a week. We have requested few council bins to be allocated along this whole street but still not been sorted yet. No bins around, people will litter rubbish everywhere. Please sort this problem asap as it's so messy. Thank you.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Granville Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The bench by the 138,162,367 bus stop is disgraceful AGAIN, 15th May
item.description:
I’ve reported this so many times. The bench is covered in birds poo. You cannot sit down on it whilst waiting for a bus. I need to sit in it as I’m disabled. You’ve cleaned it once but the birds just poo on it again. If you cut the tree back the birds wouldn’t get in it and defecate It’s disgusting and should be done properly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westmoreland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 15th May
item.description:
Rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 193, New Kent Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on pavement, 15th May
item.description:
Colworth grove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colworth Grove, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Sunken manhole cover, 15th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 114, Walworth Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London

item.title: Single sofa and baby seat dumped outside charity shop, 15th May
item.description:
It has been here for a week or so.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Common Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is still a pot hole on the road there were two that needed fixing, 15th May
item.description:
There is still a pot hole on the road there were two that needed fixing The pothole is very large yesterday you came and resolved one pothole when there was visibly too large potholes. The potholed is big and sunken and many cars often sinking into this pothole when passing our street. It is also causing parking issues as any cars parked near this pothole becomes covered in dirty muddy water and cars that are driving down the road are often not noticing and sliding dangerously over these potholes. As the pothole is so large, this reduces spaces that we can park on the road safely. I previously reported this pothole with images and stated that there were two large potholes on the road. please can you send someone out to repair the last remaining pothole thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped screen by crown and anchor pub, 15th May
item.description:
Fly tipped TV by crown and anchor pub. Please clear.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90, Palace Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crossway, Hackney, London

item.title: Can tree outside 16 Murray Ave be inspected, 14th May
item.description:
Please inspect this tree. Is it dead? Please replace if it is.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Murray Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
